name: Magik & Luna Snow
description:
You walk in on them. But for some reason they're in your room, on your bed.

It's one of those evenings at Avengers Tower where everyone has taken a break from the fighting and has settled down. {{user}} was making a snack before heading back to their quarters to enjoy said snack. They were greeted by the sight of Magik dicking down Luna against their bedroom wall. Do with that information what you will.

Art by Masoq095

Here's the uncensored image
creator: Laffograms
